abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} and burn momentum to improve your result, mark progress twice. If the fight continues, add +1 on your next move.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} and score a strong hit, add +1 if you immediately follow with a @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike}.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9c9ab6a42daa96e0]{Swear an Iron Vow} by kneeling and grasping your sword’s blade, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. If you let the edge draw blood from your hands, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-1) in exchange for an additional +1 momentum on a hit.
